title: Pavetta congesta

Pavetta congesta belongs to the family Rubiaceae and the order Lamiales. It is a species of flowering plant in the genus Pavetta. Pavetta congesta is native to tropical Africa and is found in countries such as Nigeria, Cameroon, and the Democratic Republic of Congo. The classification of Pavetta congesta is further categorized under the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Angiospermophyta. Pavetta congesta is often classified under the family Rubiaceae due to its similar characteristics with other species in the same family.
